scenario: Build failure: First error only, fix and re-run

input.error_message: TypeError: Cannot read property 'map' of undefined at handlers.js:42

expected_behavior: Skill must enforce REPRODUCE phase to confirm error is consistent across 2+ runs. Then MINIMISE by identifying the smallest input triggering failure. Output must show: (1) exact error message copied verbatim, (2) file:line number identified, (3) HYPOTHESIS stated before touching code.
notes: Build errors require reading the first error only. Do not fix until hypothesis is confirmed via INSTRUMENT phase.

expected_behavior: Skill must read the assertion diff carefully (actual vs. expected). MINIMISE by isolating which single assertion fails first. Then search for a working analog in codebase (same calculation that works). Compare side-by-side to identify hypothesis. INSTRUMENT with targeted logging. Only after confirming root cause via actual values should FIX be applied with regression test.
notes: Red flag: never assume the obvious cause without evidence from INSTRUMENT phase.

expected_behavior: Skill must run test 3 times to confirm inconsistency. Report: 'NEEDS_CONTEXT: failure is intermittent — cannot diagnose reliably.' Do NOT attempt to fix flaky tests without additional context (timing constraints, environment dependencies).
notes: Flaky tests need environmental investigation or race condition analysis, beyond the debug skill's scope.

expected_behavior: After 3 failed fix attempts on same root cause, skill must STOP current approach, report: 'BLOCKED: attempted [hyp1], [hyp2], [hyp3] — root cause still unclear.' Ask user: 'Should I try a different approach or escalate?' Do NOT proceed to 4th attempt.
notes: 3-attempt limit is hard boundary. Exceeding it signals lack of understanding, not persistence.

expected_behavior: Skill must BLOCK handoff if fix is applied without regression test. Red flag: 'Commit fix + regression test together. Never fix without test — that is a time bomb.' TDD Iron Law applies: write test FIRST (watch it fail), apply fix, watch test PASS, commit both.
notes: Regression test is not optional. Fix without test = guaranteed bug return.
